Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** introduces monoidal actions in a bicategorical setting

    This lifts to bicategories the view on actions as put forward in G. Janelidze and G.M. Kelly: A Note on Actions of a Monoidal Category, Theory and Applications of Categories, Vol. 9, 2001, No. 4, pp 61-91.
    The strength notion for the morphisms between actions is taken from
    B. Ahrens, R. Matthes and A. Mörtberg: Implementing a category-theoretic framework for typed abstract syntax, Proceedings CPP'22.

Authors: Ralph Matthes and Kobe Wullaert 2022
 *)


Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.Monoidal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.TotalMonoidal.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.EndofunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.WhiskeredMonoidalFromBicategory.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.

Import Bicat.Notations.
Import BifunctorNotations.
Import DisplayedBifunctorNotations.

Local Open Scope cat.
Section FixMoncatAndBicat.

  Context {V : category}.
  Context (Mon_V : monoidal V).

  Notation "X ⊗ Y" := (X ⊗_{ Mon_V } Y).

  Context (B : bicat).

  Definition disp_actionbicat_disp_mor {a0 a0' : B}
  {FA : V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0}
  (FAm : fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0) FA)
  {FA' : V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0'}
  (FA'm : fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0') FA')
  (G : B ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧): UU :=
    ∑ δ : parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat G,
                param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm G δ ×
                  param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm G δ.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a0': B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0') FA'
G: B ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
pm1, pm2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm G
pr1 pm1 = pr1 pm2 → pm1 = pm2

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a0': B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0') FA'
G: B ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
pm1, pm2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm G
pr1 pm1 = pr1 pm2 → pm1 = pm2

pm1 = pm2

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a0': B

Hyp: pr1 pm1 = pr1 pm2
isPredicate
  (λ x : parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat G,
   param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm G x
   × param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm G x)

δ: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat G
isaprop
  (param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm G δ)
 apply isaprop_param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq.

Mon_V: monoidal V

isaprop

 apply isaprop_param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a0': B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0') FA'
G: B ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
pm1, pm2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm G
Hyp: pr1 pm1 = pr1 pm2
pr1 pm1 = pr1 pm2
 exact Hyp.
  Qed.

Mon_V: monoidal V

 ∏ x y : B, obd x → obd y → B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)

   fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0) FA)

FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0'

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0') FA'

UU

      exact (disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm G).
  Defined.

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

v: V
hom a a ⟦ H (id₁ a) v, H' (id₁ a) v ⟧
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
v: V
id₁ a · FA v ==> FA v · id₁ a
 exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
is_nat_trans (H (id₁ a)) (H' (id₁ a))
  ((λ v : V,
    lunitor (FA v) • rinvunitor (FA v)
    :
    hom a a ⟦ H (id₁ a) v, H' (id₁ a) v ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data (H (id₁ a)) (H' (id₁ a)))
 abstract ( intros v w f;
                 cbn;
                 rewrite vassocr;
                 rewrite vcomp_lunitor;
                 do 2 rewrite vassocl;
                 apply maponpaths;
                 apply pathsinv0, (rhs_right_inv_cell _ _ _ (is_invertible_2cell_runitor _));
                 rewrite vassocl;
                 rewrite vcomp_runitor;
                 rewrite vassocr;
                 rewrite rinvunitor_runitor;
                 apply id2_left ).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FAm (id₁ a)
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_id_nat_trans FAm)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
(id₁ a ◃ fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm)
• (lunitor (FA (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
   • rinvunitor (FA (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) =
(runitor (id₁ a) • linvunitor (id₁ a))
• (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm ▹ id₁ a)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)

v, w: V
param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body Mon_V FAm FAm
  (id₁ a) (disp_actionbicat_disp_id_nat_trans FAm) v w

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
v, w: V
(rassociator (id₁ a) (FA v) (FA w)
 • (id₁ a ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w))
• disp_actionbicat_disp_id_nat_trans FAm
    (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) =
((disp_actionbicat_disp_id_nat_trans FAm v ▹ FA w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (id₁ a) (FA w)
    • (FA v ◃ disp_actionbicat_disp_id_nat_trans FAm w)))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (id₁ a)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ id₁ a))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
v, w: V
(rassociator (id₁ a) (FA v) (FA w)
 • (id₁ a ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w))
• (lunitor (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • rinvunitor (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) =
(((lunitor (FA v) • rinvunitor (FA v)) ▹ FA w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (id₁ a) (FA w)
    • (FA v ◃ (lunitor (FA w) • rinvunitor (FA w)))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (id₁ a)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ id₁ a))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
v, w: V
(rassociator (id₁ a) (FA v) (FA w)
 • (id₁ a ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w))
• (lunitor (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • rinvunitor (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) = ?b

   • rassociator (FA v) (id₁ a) (FA w))
  • (FA v ◃ (lunitor (FA w) • rinvunitor (FA w))))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (id₁ a))
• runitor (FA v · FA w) =
rassociator (id₁ a) (FA v) (FA w)
• lunitor (FA v · FA w)

    (* now pure bicategorical reasoning *)

  FA
v, w: V
(lunitor (FA v) ▹ FA w)
• ((rinvunitor (FA v) ▹ FA w)
   • (rassociator (FA v) (id₁ a) (FA w)
      • ((FA v ◃ lunitor (FA w))
         • (FA v ◃ rinvunitor (FA w))))) = ?y'
 apply idpath. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
v, w: V
((lunitor (FA v) ▹ FA w)
 • ((rinvunitor (FA v) ▹ FA w)
    • (rassociator (FA v) (id₁ a) (FA w)
       • ((FA v ◃ lunitor (FA w))
          • (FA v ◃ rinvunitor (FA w))))))
• (FA v ◃ runitor (FA w)) = lunitor (FA v) ▹ FA w

            • (FA v ◃ runitor (FA w)))))) =

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B

  FA
v, w: V
(lunitor (FA v) ▹ FA w)

      • (FA v ◃ lunitor (FA w)))) =
(lunitor (FA v) ▹ FA w) • id₂ (FA v · FA w)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B

  FA
v, w: V
id₂ (FA v) ▹ FA w = id₂ (FA v · FA w)

    apply id2_rwhisker.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
nat_trans_data (H (g1 · g2)) (H' (g1 · g2))

hom a0 a2 ⟦ H (g1 · g2) v, H' (g1 · g2) v ⟧
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v: V
g1 · g2 · FA'' v ==> FA v · (g1 · g2)

    exact (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
             • ((g1 ◃ (pr1 Hyp2 v))
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
             • ((pr1 Hyp1 v) ▹ g2) : g1 · H' g2 v ==> FA v · g1 · g2)
             • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))).
    (* refine (vcomp2 _ _).
       { apply rassociator. }
       refine (vcomp2 _ _).
       { apply lwhisker.
       apply Hyp2. }
       refine (vcomp2 _ _).
       2: { apply rassociator. }
       cbn.
       refine (vcomp2 _ _).
       { apply lassociator. }
       apply rwhisker.
       apply Hyp1. *)
  Defined.

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat

g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧

  FA'

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''

Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
is_nat_trans (H (g1 · g2)) (H' (g1 · g2))
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans_data Hyp1 Hyp2)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
# (H (g1 · g2)) f
· disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans_data Hyp1 Hyp2
    w =
disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans_data Hyp1 Hyp2 v
· # (H' (g1 · g2)) f
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
# (H (g1 · g2)) f
· (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))) =
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
 • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
    • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
       • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2)))
· # (H' (g1 · g2)) f

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
((g1 · g2 ◃ # FA'' f) • rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
• ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
   • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
      • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)) =
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
 • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
    • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
       • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2)))
• (# FA f ▹ g1 · g2)


    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) • (g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ # FA'' f)))
• ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
   • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
      • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)) =
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
 • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
    • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
       • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2)))
• (# FA f ▹ g1 · g2)

Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) • (g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ # FA'' f)))
 • (g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w))
• ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
   • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2) =
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
 • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)

       • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2)))
• (# FA f ▹ g1 · g2)

((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) • (g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ # FA'' f)))
 • (g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w))

   • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''

Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
?b =
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
 • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
    • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
       • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2)))
• (# FA f ▹ g1 · g2)

((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) • (g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ # FA'' f)))
 • (g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w))
• ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
   • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2) = ?b

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) • (g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ # FA'' f)))
• (g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w) = ?y'

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
• ((g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ # FA'' f)) • (g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)) = ?y'

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
(g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ # FA'' f)) • (g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w) = ?t2

      exact (lwhisker_vcomp g1  (g2 ◃ # FA'' f) (pr1 Hyp2 w)).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
 • (g1 ◃ ((g2 ◃ # FA'' f) • pr1 Hyp2 w)))
• ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
   • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2) =
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
 • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
    • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
       • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2)))
• (# FA f ▹ g1 · g2)

Mon_V: monoidal V

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''

Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
 • (g1 ◃ ((g2 ◃ # FA'' f) • pr1 Hyp2 w)))
• ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
   • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2) = ?b
V: category

       • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2)))
• (# FA f ▹ g1 · g2)

Mon_V: monoidal V

a0, a1, a2: B

g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0

  FA'

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
 • (g1 ◃ ((g2 ◃ # FA'' f) • pr1 Hyp2 w)))
• ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
   • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) • (g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v))
  • lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2) • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
• (((# FA f ▹ g1) ▹ g2) • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)


    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
• ((g1 ◃ ((g2 ◃ # FA'' f) • pr1 Hyp2 w))
   • (lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
      • ((pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2) • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))) =
rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
• ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
   • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
      • ((pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2)
         • (((# FA f ▹ g1) ▹ g2)
            • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))

   • ((pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2) • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)) =
(g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
• (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
   • ((pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2)
      • (((# FA f ▹ g1) ▹ g2)
         • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)))

• rassociator (FA w) g1 g2

f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
(g2 ◃ # FA'' f) • pr1 Hyp2 w = ?t2

      exact (pr21 Hyp2 v w f).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
((g1 ◃ (pr11 Hyp2) v · # (H' g2) f)
 • lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2) • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2) =
(((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v) • lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2)
 • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2)) • ((# FA f ▹ g1) ▹ g2)

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat

g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA

  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
((g1 ◃ (pr11 Hyp2) v · # (H' g2) f)
 • lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2) • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2) = 
?b

 • lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2) • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2) =
((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v) • lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2)
• (# (H g1) f · (pr11 Hyp1) w ▹ g2)

Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2

f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧

      apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat

Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V

• ((pr11 Hyp1) w ▹ g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
(g1 ◃ (# FA' f ▹ g2)) • lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2 =
lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • ((g1 ◃ # FA' f) ▹ g2)

    apply rwhisker_lwhisker.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans {a0 a1 a2 : B}
    {g1 : B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧}
    {g2 : B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧}
    {FA : V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0}
    {FAm : fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0) FA}
    {FA' : V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1}
    {FA'm : fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1) FA'}
    {FA'' : V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2}
    {FA''m : fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''}
    (Hyp1 : disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1)
    (Hyp2 : disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2):
    parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat(V:=V)(FA:=FA)(FA':=FA'') (g1 · g2) :=
    _,, disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_is_nat_trans Hyp1 Hyp2.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA''m
  (g1 · g2)
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans Hyp1 Hyp2)

Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA''m
  (g1 · g2)
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans Hyp1 Hyp2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat

   • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) g2
       • (((g1
            ◃ pr1
                (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly FA'm))
           ▹ g2)
          • (((runitor g1 ▹ g2) • (linvunitor g1 ▹ g2))
             • ((fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm ▹ g1)
                ▹ g2))))
      • rassociator (FA (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) g1 g2)) =
?t2

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
(((((((((rassociator g1 g2
           (FA'' (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
         • (g1
            ◃ (g2
               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                      FA''m)))) • (g1 ◃ runitor g2))
       • (g1 ◃ linvunitor g2))
      • (g1 ◃ (fmonoidal_preservesunit FA'm ▹ g2)))
     • lassociator g1 (FA' (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) g2)
    • ((g1
        ◃ pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly FA'm))
       ▹ g2)) • (runitor g1 ▹ g2))
  • (linvunitor g1 ▹ g2))
 • ((fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm ▹ g1) ▹ g2))
• rassociator (FA (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) g1 g2 = ?t2

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B

g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
(g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservesunit FA''m)
• (((((((((((g1 · g2
             ◃ pr1
                 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                    FA''m))
            • rassociator g1 g2
                (monoidal_unit
                   (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2)))
           • (g1 ◃ runitor g2)) • (g1 ◃ linvunitor g2))

            g2)

          ▹ g2)) • (runitor g1 ▹ g2))
     • (linvunitor g1 ▹ g2))
    • ((fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm ▹ g1) ▹ g2))
   • rassociator (FA (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) g1 g2) =
(runitor (g1 · g2) • linvunitor (g1 · g2))
• (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm ▹ g1 · g2)

rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2)
• ((g1 ◃ runitor g2)
   • ((g1 ◃ linvunitor g2)
      • ((g1 ◃ (fmonoidal_preservesunit FA'm ▹ g2))
         • (lassociator g1 (FA' (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              g2

                     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly

                  • ((linvunitor g1 ▹ g2)
                     • (((fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm
                          ▹ g1) ▹ g2)
                        • rassociator
                            (FA (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                            g1 g2)))))))) = ?b

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
(g1 ◃ (fmonoidal_preservesunit FA'm ▹ g2))
• (lassociator g1 (FA' (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) g2
   • (((g1
        ◃ pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly FA'm))
       ▹ g2)
      • ((runitor g1 ▹ g2)
         • ((linvunitor g1 ▹ g2)
            • (((fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm ▹ g1)
                ▹ g2)
               • rassociator
                   (FA (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) g1 g2))))) =
?t2

• ((g1 ◃ runitor g2)
   • ((g1 ◃ linvunitor g2)

         • rassociator (FA (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) g1

   • ((g1 ◃ linvunitor g2)
      • (lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2
         • ((runitor g1 ▹ g2)
            • ((linvunitor g1 ▹ g2)
               • (((fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm ▹ g1)
                   ▹ g2)
                  • rassociator
                      (FA (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) g1 g2)))))) =
?b

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2)
• ((g1 ◃ runitor g2)
   • ((g1 ◃ linvunitor g2)
      • (lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2
         • ((runitor g1 ▹ g2)
            • ((linvunitor g1 ▹ g2)
               • (rassociator (id₁ a0) g1 g2
                  • (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm
                     ▹ g1 · g2))))))) = ?b

      apply idpath. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2)
• ((g1 ◃ runitor g2)
   • ((g1 ◃ linvunitor g2)
      • (lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2
         • ((runitor g1 ▹ g2)
            • ((linvunitor g1 ▹ g2)
               • (rassociator (id₁ a0) g1 g2
                  • (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm
                     ▹ g1 · g2))))))) =
(runitor (g1 · g2) • linvunitor (g1 · g2))
• (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm ▹ g1 · g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
((((((rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2) • (g1 ◃ runitor g2))
     • (g1 ◃ linvunitor g2))
    • lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2) • (runitor g1 ▹ g2))
  • (linvunitor g1 ▹ g2)) • rassociator (id₁ a0) g1 g2)
• (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm ▹ g1 · g2) =
(runitor (g1 · g2) • linvunitor (g1 · g2))
• (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm ▹ g1 · g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
(((((rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2) • (g1 ◃ runitor g2))
    • (g1 ◃ linvunitor g2))
   • lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2) • (runitor g1 ▹ g2))
 • (linvunitor g1 ▹ g2)) • rassociator (id₁ a0) g1 g2 =
runitor (g1 · g2) • linvunitor (g1 · g2)

    (* now pure bicategorical reasoning *)
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
(((((rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2) • (g1 ◃ runitor g2))
    • (g1 ◃ linvunitor g2))
   • lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2) • (runitor g1 ▹ g2))
 • (linvunitor g1 ▹ g2)) • rassociator (id₁ a0) g1 g2 =
(rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2) • (g1 ◃ runitor g2))
• linvunitor (g1 · g2)

     • (g1 ◃ linvunitor g2))
    • lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2) • (runitor g1 ▹ g2))
  • (linvunitor g1 ▹ g2)) • rassociator (id₁ a0) g1 g2)
• lunitor (g1 · g2) =
rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2) • (g1 ◃ runitor g2)

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2)
• ((g1 ◃ runitor g2)
   • ((g1 ◃ linvunitor g2)
      • (lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2
         • (runitor g1 ▹ g2)))) = ?b

      apply idpath. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2)
• ((g1 ◃ runitor g2)
   • ((g1 ◃ linvunitor g2)
      • (lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2
         • (runitor g1 ▹ g2)))) =
rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2) • (g1 ◃ runitor g2)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA

  FA'

 apply id2_right. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2)
• ((g1 ◃ runitor g2)
   • ((g1 ◃ linvunitor g2)
      • (lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2
         • (runitor g1 ▹ g2)))) =
(rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2) • (g1 ◃ runitor g2))
• id₂ (g1 · g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B

g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2)
• ((g1 ◃ runitor g2)
   • ((g1 ◃ linvunitor g2)
      • (lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2
         • (runitor g1 ▹ g2)))) =
rassociator g1 g2 (id₁ a2)
• ((g1 ◃ runitor g2) • id₂ (g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B

g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
(g1 ◃ linvunitor g2)
• (lassociator g1 (id₁ a1) g2 • (runitor g1 ▹ g2)) =
id₂ (g1 · g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

  FA

  FA'

FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
(g1 ◃ linvunitor g2) • (g1 ◃ lunitor g2) =
id₂ (g1 · g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0

  FA

  FA'

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
g1 ◃ (linvunitor g2 • lunitor g2) = id₂ (g1 · g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
g1 ◃ id₂ g2 = id₂ (g1 · g2)

    apply lwhisker_id2.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0

  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA''m
  (g1 · g2)
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans Hyp1 Hyp2)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B

g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0

  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body Mon_V FAm FA''m
  (g1 · g2)
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans Hyp1 Hyp2) v w

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans_data Hyp1 Hyp2
    (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) =
param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_RHS Mon_V FAm
  (g1 · g2) v w
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans_data Hyp1 Hyp2
     v)
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans_data Hyp1 Hyp2
     w)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
aux1:= (pr22 Hyp1) v w: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body Mon_V FAm
  FA'm g1 (pr1 Hyp1) v w
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
aux1:= (pr22 Hyp1) v w: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body Mon_V FAm
  FA'm g1 (pr1 Hyp1) v w
aux2:= (pr22 Hyp2) v w: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body Mon_V FA'm
  FA''m g2 (pr1 Hyp2) v w
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
aux1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_variant
  Mon_V FAm FA'm g1 (pr1 Hyp1) v w
aux2:= (pr22 Hyp2) v w: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body Mon_V FA'm
  FA''m g2 (pr1 Hyp2) v w
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
aux1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_variant
  Mon_V FAm FA'm g1 (pr1 Hyp1) v w
aux2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_variant
  Mon_V FA'm FA''m g2 (pr1 Hyp2) v w
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
aux1: pr1 Hyp1 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) =
param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS
  Mon_V FAm FA'm g1 v w 
  (pr1 Hyp1 v) (pr1 Hyp1 w)
aux2: pr1 Hyp2 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) =
param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS
  Mon_V FA'm FA''m g2 v w 
  (pr1 Hyp2 v) (pr1 Hyp2 w)
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1
       ◃ param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS
           Mon_V FA'm FA''m g2 v w (pr1 Hyp2 v)
           (pr1 Hyp2 w))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS
               Mon_V FAm FA'm g1 v w (pr1 Hyp1 v)
               (pr1 Hyp1 w) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =

       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))

B: bicat

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1
       ◃ param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS
           Mon_V FA'm FA''m g2 v w (pr1 Hyp2 v)
           (pr1 Hyp2 w))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS
               Mon_V FAm FA'm g1 v w (pr1 Hyp1 v)
               (pr1 Hyp1 w) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1
       ◃ ((g2
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  FA''m v w))
          • (lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
             • (((pr1 Hyp2 v ▹ FA'' w)
                 • (rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
                    • (FA' v ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)))
                • (lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2
                   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                        FA'm v w ▹ g2))))))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (((g1
               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      FA'm v w))
              • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w)
                 • (((pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ FA' w)
                     • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                        • (FA v ◃ pr1 Hyp1 w)))
                    • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            FAm v w ▹ g1))))) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
          • (pr1 Hyp1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (pr1 Hyp1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
trieq1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  g1 δ1
pentaeq1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm
  FA'm g1 δ1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1
       ◃ ((g2
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  FA''m v w))
          • (lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
             • (((pr1 Hyp2 v ▹ FA'' w)
                 • (rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
                    • (FA' v ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)))
                • (lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2
                   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                        FA'm v w ▹ g2))))))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (((g1
               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      FA'm v w))
              • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w)
                 • (((pr1 (δ1,, trieq1,, pentaeq1) v
                      ▹ FA' w)
                     • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                        • (FA v ◃ pr1 (δ1,, ...) w)))
                    • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            FAm v w ▹ g1))))) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
          • (pr1 (δ1,, trieq1,, pentaeq1) v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 Hyp2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (pr1 (δ1,, trieq1,, pentaeq1) w
                    ▹ g2)) • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
trieq1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  g1 δ1
pentaeq1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm
  FA'm g1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
trieq2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FA'm
  FA''m g2 δ2
pentaeq2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FA'm
  FA''m g2 δ2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1
       ◃ ((g2
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  FA''m v w))
          • (lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
             • (((pr1 (δ2,, trieq2,, pentaeq2) v
                  ▹ FA'' w)
                 • (rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
                    • (FA' v
                       ◃ pr1 (δ2,, trieq2,, pentaeq2)
                           w)))
                • (lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2
                   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                        FA'm v w ▹ g2))))))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (((g1
               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      FA'm v w))
              • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w)
                 • (((pr1 (δ1,, trieq1,, pentaeq1) v
                      ▹ FA' w)
                     • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                        • (FA v ◃ pr1 (δ1,, ...) w)))
                    • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            FAm v w ▹ g1))))) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ pr1 (δ2,, trieq2,, pentaeq2) v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
          • (pr1 (δ1,, trieq1,, pentaeq1) v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ pr1 (δ2,, trieq2,, pentaeq2) w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (pr1 (δ1,, trieq1,, pentaeq1) w
                    ▹ g2)) • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
trieq1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  g1 δ1
pentaeq1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm
  FA'm g1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
trieq2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FA'm
  FA''m g2 δ2
pentaeq2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FA'm
  FA''m g2 δ2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1
       ◃ ((g2
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  FA''m v w))
          • (lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
             • (((δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)
                 • (rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
                    • (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
                • (lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2
                   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                        FA'm v w ▹ g2))))))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (((g1
               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      FA'm v w))
              • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w)
                 • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w)
                     • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                        • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)))
                    • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            FAm v w ▹ g1))))) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (δ1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ δ2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B

g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1
       ◃ ((g2
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  FA''m v w))
          • (lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
             • (((δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)
                 • (rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
                    • (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
                • (lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2
                   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                        FA'm v w ▹ g2))))))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (((g1
               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      FA'm v w))
              • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w)
                 • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w)
                     • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                        • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)))
                    • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            FAm v w ▹ g1))))) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (δ1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ δ2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • ((g1
       ◃ ((g2
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  FA''m v w))
          • (lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
             • (((δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)
                 • (rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
                    • (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
                • (lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2
                   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                        FA'm v w ▹ g2))))))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (((g1
               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      FA'm v w))
              • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w)
                 • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w)
                     • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                        • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)))
                    • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            FAm v w ▹ g1))))) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (δ1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • (FA v
       ◃ (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)
          • ((g1 ◃ δ2 w)
             • ((lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2
                 • (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                • rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • (((g1
        ◃ (g2
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  FA''m v w)))
       • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
          • (((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
              • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
                 • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))))
             • ((g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
                • (g1
                   ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                        FA'm v w ▹ g2))))))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
          • (((g1
               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      FA'm v w))
              • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w)
                 • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w)
                     • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                        • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)))
                    • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            FAm v w ▹ g1))))) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (δ1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
       • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
          • (((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
              • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
             • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 · g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   • (((g1
        ◃ (g2
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  FA''m v w)))
       • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
          • (((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
              • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
                 • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))))
             • ((g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
                • (g1
                   ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                        FA'm v w ▹ g2))))))
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2

               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly

              • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w)
                 • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w)
                     • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                        • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)))
                    • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            FAm v w ▹ g1))))) ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2))) =
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat

  FA'' w)

    • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))

      • ((g1

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(((((((((((g1 · g2
           ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w)
          • rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)))
         • (g1
            ◃ (g2
               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      FA''m v w))))
        • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
       • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
      • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
   • (g1
      ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w ▹ g2)))
  • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
 • ((((((((g1
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm
                  v w))
          • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
         • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))
        • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w))
       • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)) • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)
     • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1))
    ▹ g2)) • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2 =
?t2

B: bicat

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 (... · ...)
             • (g1 ◃ (...))) • (g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ pr1 ...)))
           • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
          • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
         • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
        • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
       • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
      • (g1
         ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w
            ▹ g2)))
     • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
    • ((((((((g1
              ◃ pr1
                  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                     FA'm v w))
             • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
            • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))
           • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w))
          • (FA v ◃ δ1 w))
         • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)
        • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1))
       ▹ g2))
   • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (δ1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
       • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
          • (((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
              • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
             • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

?b =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (δ1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ 
  FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
       • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
          • (((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
              • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
             • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 (... · ...)
             • (g1 ◃ (...))) • (g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ pr1 ...)))
           • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
          • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
         • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
        • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
       • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
      • (g1
         ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w
            ▹ g2)))
     • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
    • ((((((((g1
              ◃ pr1
                  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                     FA'm v w))
             • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
            • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))
           • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w))
          • (FA v ◃ δ1 w))
         • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)
        • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1))
       ▹ g2))
   • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2) = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
   • ((g1
       ◃ (g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
      • ((g1
          ◃ (g2
             ◃ pr1
                 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                    FA''m v w)))
         • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
               • ((g1
                   ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
                  • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
                     • ((g1
                         ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w)
                             g2)
                        • ((g1
                            ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                 FA'm v w ▹ g2))
                           • (lassociator g1
                                (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
                                g2
                              • (((...) ▹ g2)
                                 • rassociator
                                     (FA ...) g1 g2))))))))))) =
?b

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
• ((g1
    ◃ (g2
       ◃ pr1
           (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA''m v
              w)))
   • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
               • ((g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
                  • ((g1
                      ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                           FA'm v w ▹ g2))
                     • (lassociator g1
                          (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2
                        • ((((g1 ◃ pr1 ...)
                             • (lassociator g1 ... ...
                                • (...))) ▹ g2)
                           • rassociator
                               (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
                               g1 g2))))))))) = ?t2

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((g1
          ◃ (g2
             ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA''m v w))
         • (g1
            ◃ (g2
               ◃ pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      FA''m v w))))
        • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
       • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
      • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
   • (g1
      ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w ▹ g2)))
  • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
 • ((((((((g1
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm
                  v w))
          • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
         • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))
        • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w))
       • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)) • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)
     • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1))
    ▹ g2)) • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2 =
?t2

      apply lwhisker_id2.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
   • (((((((((id₂ (g1 · (g2 · ...))
              • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
             • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
            • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
           • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
          • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
         • (g1
            ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w
               ▹ g2)))
        • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
       • ((((((((g1
                 ◃ pr1
                     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                        FA'm v w))
                • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
               • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))
              • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w))
             • (FA v ◃ δ1 w))
            • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)
           • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w
              ▹ g1)) ▹ g2))
      • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2)) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (δ1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
       • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
          • (((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
              • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
             • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
   • (((((((((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
             • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
            • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
           • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
          • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
         • (g1
            ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w
               ▹ g2)))
        • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
       • ((((((((g1
                 ◃ pr1
                     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                        FA'm v w))
                • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
               • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))
              • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w))
             • (FA v ◃ δ1 w))
            • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)
           • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w
              ▹ g1)) ▹ g2))
      • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2)) =
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (δ1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
       • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
          • (((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
              • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
             • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
   • (((((((((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
             • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
            • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
           • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
          • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
         • (g1
            ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w
               ▹ g2)))
        • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
       • ((((((((g1
                 ◃ pr1
                     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                        FA'm v w))
                • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
               • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))
              • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w))
             • (FA v ◃ δ1 w))
            • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)
           • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w
              ▹ g1)) ▹ g2))
      • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2)) = 
?b

 • ((((((((g1
           ◃ pr1

                  v w))
          • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
         • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))

       • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)) • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)

    ▹ g2)) • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2 =

   • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)

    • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))

              • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
             • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
   • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
      • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (δ1 v ▹ g2))
         • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
    • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
       • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
          • (((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
              • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
             • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
   • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2)) =
(((((((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
         • rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w))
        • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
       • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
      • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
   • (g1
      ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w ▹ g2)))
  • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
 • ((((((((g1
           ◃ pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm
                  v w))
          • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
         • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))
        • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w))
       • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)) • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)
     • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1))
    ▹ g2)) • rassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2
