  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
    • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
       • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 • (δ1 v ▹ g2))
          • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))) ▹ FA'' w)
  • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
     • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
        • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
           • (((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
               • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
              • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))))))
 • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
    • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2)))
• lassociator (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g1 g2 =
((((((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
        • rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w))
       • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
      • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
     • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
    • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
   • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
  • (g1
     ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w ▹ g2)))
 • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
• ((((((((g1
          ◃ pr1
              (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm
                 v w))
         • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
        • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w))
      • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)) • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)
    • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1))
   ▹ g2)

                           FAm v w ▹ g1 · g2)

V: category

B: bicat

FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v)
  • ((g1 ◃ δ2 v)
     • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
        • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) • rassociator (FA v) g1 g2))))
 ▹ FA'' w)
• (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
   • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
      • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
         • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
            • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
               • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                  • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                       (g1 · g2)
                     • (lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1
                          g2
                        • ((fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                              FAm v w ▹ g1) ▹ g2))))))))) =
((((((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
        • rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w))
       • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
      • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
     • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
    • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
   • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
  • (g1
     ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w ▹ g2)))
 • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
• ((((((((g1
          ◃ pr1
              (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm
                 v w))
         • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w))
        • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w))
      • (FA v ◃ δ1 w)) • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1)
    • (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1))
   ▹ g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) ▹ FA'' w)
 • (((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
    • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
       • (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
          • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w)))))
• (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
   • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
      • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
         • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
            • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
               • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                  • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                       (g1 · g2)
                     • (lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1
                          g2
                        • ((fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                              FAm v w ▹ g1) ▹ g2))))))))) =
((((((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
        • rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w))
       • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
      • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
     • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
    • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
   • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
  • (g1
     ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w ▹ g2)))
 • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
• ((((((((g1
          ◃ pr1
              (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm
                 v w)) ▹ g2)
        • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
       • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
      • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
     • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
    • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2))
   • ((fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1)
      ▹ g2))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(((((((((((((...) • (...))
           • (lassociator g1 ... g2 ▹ FA'' w))
          • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
         • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
        • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
       • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
      • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
     • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
    • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
   • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
  • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
 • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2)
• ((fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1) ▹ g2) =
(((((((((((((...) • (...))
           • (g1 ◃ rassociator ... g2 ...))
          • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
         • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
        • (g1
           ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w
              ▹ g2)))
       • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
      • ((g1
          ◃ pr1
              (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm
                 v w)) ▹ g2))
     • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
    • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
 • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2))
• ((fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w ▹ g1) ▹ g2)

Mon_V: monoidal V

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • (g1 ◃ (...)))
          • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
         • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
        • (g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2))
       • (g1
          ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w
             ▹ g2)))
      • lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2)
     • ((g1
         ◃ pr1
             (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v
                w)) ▹ g2))
    • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))

     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 = ?b

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • (g1 ◃ (...)))
          • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
         • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))

          ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w

     • ((g1

                w)) ▹ g2))
    • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2

        • rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w))
       • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))

     ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w ▹ g2)))

    ◃ pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v w))

                          (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2

  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?y =
(g1 ◃ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w ▹ g2))
• lassociator g1 (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) g2

              apply pathsinv0, rwhisker_lwhisker. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?t1 =
(lassociator g1 (FA' v · FA' w) g2
 • ((g1 ◃ fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w) ▹ g2))
• ((g1
    ◃ pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v w))
   ▹ g2)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?t1 =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w
• pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v w)

         apply pathsinv0, (pr2 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v w)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
(((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
     • (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
        • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
           • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
              • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
                 • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
                    • ((g1 ◃ lassociator ... ... g2)
                       • (lassociator g1 ... g2
                          • (...)))))))))
    • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
(((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
     • (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
        • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
           • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
              • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
                 • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
                    • ((g1 ◃ lassociator ... ... g2)
                       • (lassociator g1 ... g2
                          • (...)))))))))
    • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
(((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
     • (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
        • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
           • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
              • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
                 • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
                    • ((g1 ◃ lassociator ... ... g2)
                       • (lassociator g1 ... g2
                          • (...)))))))))
    • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
(((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
     • (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
        • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
           • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
              • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
                 • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
                    • ((g1 ◃ lassociator ... ... g2)
                       • (lassociator g1 ... g2
                          • id₂ ...))))))))
    • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
(((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
     • (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
        • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
           • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
              • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
                 • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
                    • ((g1 ◃ lassociator ... ... g2)
                       • lassociator g1 (... · ...) g2)))))))
    • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

    (* the equation is now free from the preservation of the tensor by the given strong monoidal functors;
       both sides of the equation are chains of 13 two-cells *)
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
(((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
     • (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
        • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
           • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
              • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
                 • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
                    • ((g1 ◃ lassociator ... ... g2)
                       • 
                       lassociator g1 (... · ...) g2)))))))
    • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
(((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
     • (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
        • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
           • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
              • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
                 • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
                    • ((g1 ◃ lassociator ... ... g2)
                       • lassociator g1 (... · ...) g2)))))))
    • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
   • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
               • ((g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
                  • (lassociator g1 (FA' v · FA' w) g2
                     • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v)
                           (FA' w) ▹ g2)
                        • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2)
                           • ((rassociator (FA v) g1
                                 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
                              • (((...) ▹ g2)
                                 • (lassociator ...
                                      ... g1 ▹ g2))))))))))))

         
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?t1 =
(g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
• (lassociator g1 (FA' v · FA' w) g2
   • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2)
      • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2)
         • ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
            • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
               • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2))))))

         
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?t1 =
((((((g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
     • lassociator g1 (FA' v · FA' w) g2)
    • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2))
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

         
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?y =
((g1 ◃ lassociator (FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
 • lassociator g1 (FA' v · FA' w) g2)
• (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w) ▹ g2)

         apply pathsinv0, lassociator_lassociator. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
   • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
               • (((((lassociator g1 (FA' v)
                        (FA' w · g2)
                      • lassociator (g1 · FA' v)
                          (FA' w) g2)
                     • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
                    • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                       ▹ g2)) • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
                  • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
   • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
               • (((((lassociator g1 
                       (FA' v) 
                       (FA' w · g2)
                      • 
                      lassociator 
                       (g1 · FA' v) 
                       (FA' w) g2)
                     • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
                    • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                       ▹ g2)) • 
                   ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
                  • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • ((...) ▹ FA'' w))
          • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w))
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) ▹ FA'' w)
• (((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
   • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
      • (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
         • ((rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w)
            • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
               • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
                  • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
                     • ((FA v
                         ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
                        • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                           • ((FA v
                               ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1
                                   g2)
                              • (lassociator (FA v)
                                   (FA w) (g1 · g2)
                                 • lassociator
                                     (... · ...) g1 g2))))))))))) =
?b

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w)
   • ((FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w))
      • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
         • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
            • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
               • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                  • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                       (g1 · g2)
                     • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2))))))) =
?t2

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((((((rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w)
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
      • (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 = ?t2

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((rassociator (FA v) g1 g2 ▹ FA'' w)
 • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · g2) (FA'' w))
• (FA v ◃ rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' w)) = ?y'

      apply rassociator_rassociator. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) ▹ FA'' w)
• (((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
   • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
      • (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
         • (((((((rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
                  • rassociator (FA v) g1
                      (g2 · FA'' w))
                 • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
                • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
               • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
              • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
             • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
            • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2)))) =
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
   • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
               • (((((lassociator g1 (FA' v)
                        (FA' w · g2)
                      • lassociator (g1 · FA' v)
                          (FA' w) g2)
                     • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
                    • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                       ▹ g2)) • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
                  • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))))))

    (* both sides of the equation are chains of 12 two-cells *)
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) ▹ FA'' w)
• (((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
   • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
      • (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
         • (((((((rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
                  • rassociator (FA v) g1
                      (g2 · FA'' w))
                 • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
                • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
               • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
              • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
             • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
            • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2)))) = 
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
   • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
               • (((((lassociator g1 
                       (FA' v) 
                       (FA' w · g2)
                      • 
                      lassociator 
                       (g1 · FA' v) 
                       (FA' w) g2)
                     • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
                    • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                       ▹ g2)) • 
                   ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
                  • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)
   • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
               • (((((lassociator g1 (FA' v)
                        (FA' w · g2)
                      • lassociator (g1 · FA' v)
                          (FA' w) g2)
                     • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
                    • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                       ▹ g2)) • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
                  • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
((((((((((rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
          • rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w))
         • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
        • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
       • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
      • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
     • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2))
    • lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

         
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?y =
rassociator (g1 · g2) (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v · FA'' w)

         apply rassociator_rassociator. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) ▹ FA'' w)
• (((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
   • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
      • (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
         • (((((((rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
                  • rassociator (FA v) g1
                      (g2 · FA'' w))
                 • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
                • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
               • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
              • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
             • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
            • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2)))) =
((((((((((((rassociator g1 g2 ... ▹ FA'' w)
           • rassociator g1 (g2 · ...) (FA'' w))
          • (g1 ◃ rassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
         • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
        • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
       • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
      • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
     • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2))
    • lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) ▹ FA'' w)
• (((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
   • ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
      • (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
         • (rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
            • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w)
               • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
                  • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
                     • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                        • ((FA v
                            ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                           • (lassociator (FA v)
                                (FA w) (g1 · g2)
                              • lassociator
                                  (FA v · FA w) g1 g2)))))))))) =
(rassociator g1 g2 (FA'' v) ▹ FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 (g2 · FA'' v) (FA'' w)
   • ((g1 ◃ rassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
         • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
               • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
                  • (lassociator g1 (FA' v)
                       (FA' w · g2)
                     • (lassociator (g1 · FA' v)
                          (FA' w) g2
                        • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2)
                           • ((rassociator (FA v) g1
                                 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
                              • (((...) ▹ g2)
                                 • (lassociator ...
                                      ... g1 ▹ g2))))))))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
• ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
   • (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
      • (rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
         • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w)
            • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
               • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
                  • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                     • ((FA v
                         ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                        • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                             (g1 · g2)
                           • lassociator (FA v · FA w)
                               g1 g2))))))))) =
rassociator g1 (g2 · FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
   • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
               • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2)
                  • (lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w)
                       g2
                     • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2)
                        • ((rassociator (FA v) g1
                              (FA' w) ▹ g2)
                           • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
                              • (lassociator (FA v)
                                   (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))))))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
• ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
   • (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
      • (rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
         • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w)
            • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
               • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
                  • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                     • ((FA v
                         ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                        • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                             (g1 · g2)
                           • lassociator (FA v · FA w)
                               g1 g2))))))))) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
rassociator g1 (g2 · FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
   • ((g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))
         • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
            • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
               • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2)
                  • (lassociator 
                       (g1 · FA' v) 
                       (FA' w) g2
                     • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2)
                       • 
                       ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                       ▹ g2)
                       • 
                       (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
                       • 
                       (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       ▹ g2)))))))))))

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat

  FA'

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
((((((((((rassociator g1 (g2 · FA'' v) (FA'' w)
          • (g1 ◃ rassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
         • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
        • (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w)))
       • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
      • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
     • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2))
    • lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
rassociator g1 (g2 · FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
   • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))

              
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
rassociator g1 (g2 · FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
   • (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?t1 =
(g1 ◃ rassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))
• (g1 ◃ lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))

                   
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?t1 =
g1
◃ (rassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
   • lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w))

                   
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?t1 =
rassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• lassociator g2 (FA'' v) (FA'' w)

                   apply pathsinv0, rassociator_lassociator. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?y0 =
rassociator g1 (g2 · FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (g1 ◃ id₂ (g2 · FA'' v · FA'' w))

              
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?y0 =
rassociator g1 (g2 · FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• id₂ (g1 · (g2 · FA'' v · FA'' w))

              apply pathsinv0, id2_right. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?y =
rassociator g1 (g2 · FA'' v) (FA'' w)
• (g1 ◃ (δ2 v ▹ FA'' w))

         apply pathsinv0, rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
• ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
   • (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
      • (rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
         • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w)
            • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
               • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
                  • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                     • ((FA v
                         ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                        • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                             (g1 · g2)
                           • lassociator (FA v · FA w)
                               g1 g2))))))))) =
((((((((((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
        • rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w))
       • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
      • (g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w)))
     • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2))
    • lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w) g2)
   • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2))
  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
 • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
• ((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
   • (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
      • (rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
         • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w)
            • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
               • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
                  • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                     • ((FA v
                         ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                        • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                             (g1 · g2)
                           • lassociator (FA v · FA w)
                               g1 g2))))))))) =
((g1 ◃ δ2 v) ▹ FA'' w)
• (rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
   • ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
      • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
         • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2)
            • (lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w) g2
               • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2)
                  • ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
                      ▹ g2)
                     • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
                        • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                             g1 ▹ g2)))))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
   • (rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
      • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w)
         • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
            • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
               • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                  • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                     • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                          (g1 · g2)
                        • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1
                            g2)))))))) =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
      • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2)
         • (lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w) g2
            • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2)
               • ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
                  • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
                     • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                        ▹ g2))))))))

    (* two occurrences of [δ2] vanished *)
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
   • (rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
      • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w)
         • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
            • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
               • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                  • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                     • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                          (g1 · g2)
                        • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1
                            g2)))))))) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
      • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2)
         • (lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w) g2
            • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2)
               • ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
                  • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
                     • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       ▹ g2))))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• (((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
   • (rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
      • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w)
         • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
            • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
               • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                  • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                     • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                          (g1 · g2)
                        • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1
                            g2)))))))) = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
• (rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w)
   • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w)
      • ((FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))
         • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
            • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
               • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                  • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                       (g1 · g2)
                     • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2))))))) =
?t2

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(((((((((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
       • rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w))
      • rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w))
     • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 = ?t2

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((δ1 v ▹ g2) ▹ FA'' w)
  • rassociator (FA v · g1) g2 (FA'' w))
 • rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w))
• (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)) = ?y'

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
  • (δ1 v ▹ g2 · FA'' w))
 • rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w))
• (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w)) = ?y'

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
 • (δ1 v ▹ g2 · FA'' w))
• (rassociator (FA v) g1 (g2 · FA'' w)
   • (FA v ◃ (g1 ◃ δ2 w))) = ?y'

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
 • (δ1 v ▹ g2 · FA'' w))
• ((FA v · g1 ◃ δ2 w)
   • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)) = ?y'

   • ((FA v · g1 ◃ δ2 w)
      • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2))) = ?y'

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA'

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(δ1 v ▹ g2 · FA'' w) • (FA v · g1 ◃ δ2 w) = ?y'

        apply vcomp_whisker. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• ((((((rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
        • (((g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w) • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2))
           • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)))
       • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
      • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
     • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
    • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
   • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2) =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
      • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2)
         • (lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w) g2
            • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2)
               • ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
                  • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
                     • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                        ▹ g2))))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA'

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• ((((((rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
        • (((g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w) • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2))
           • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)))
       • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
      • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
     • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
    • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
   • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B

g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA'

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • ((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
      • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2)
         • (lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w) g2

               • ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
                  • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
                     • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                       ▹ g2))))))))

g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V

(g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
• (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2)

      • (((δ1 v ▹ FA' w) ▹ g2)

               • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2))))))

((((((g1 ◃ (FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
     • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (FA' w · g2))
    • lassociator (g1 · FA' v) (FA' w) g2)

  • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))

• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA

FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• ((((((rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
        • (((g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w) • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2))
           • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)))
       • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
      • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
     • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
    • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
   • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2) =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • (((((lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
          • (g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2)
            • lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
       • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA'

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA'

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux: (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• ((((((rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
        • (((g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w) • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2))
           • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)))
       • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
      • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
     • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
    • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
   • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2) =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • (((((lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
          • (g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2)
            • lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
       • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

Mon_V: monoidal V

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2

?b =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
?b =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w))

           apply inverse_pentagon_2. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
id₂ (FA'' w) ⋆⋆ lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w =
id₂ (FA'' w) ⋆⋆ lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2

      apply pathsinv0, hcomp_identity_right. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux: (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• ((((((rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
        • (((g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w) • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2))
           • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)))
       • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
      • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
     • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
    • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
   • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2) =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • (((((lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
          • (g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2)
            • lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
       • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux: (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• ((((((rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
        • (((g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w) • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2))
           • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)))
       • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
      • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
     • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
    • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
   • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux: (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
?b =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • (((((lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
          • (g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2)
            • lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
       • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA
