δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux: (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• ((((((rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)
        • (((g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w) • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2))
           • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)))
       • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
      • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
     • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
    • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
   • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2) = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux: (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
(((((((((lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
        • rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
       • (g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w)) • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2))
     • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 = ?b

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux: (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
(lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) = ?y'

      apply Haux. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux: (lassociator g1 (FA' v) g2 ▹ FA'' w)
• rassociator (g1 · FA' v) g2 (FA'' w) =
(rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
 • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
• lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
(((((((((rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
         • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
        • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w))
       • (g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w)) • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2))
     • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • (((((lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
          • (g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2)
            • lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
       • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
(((((((((rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
         • (g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w)))
        • lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w))
       • (g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w)) • (δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2))
     • rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2))
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • (((((lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
          • (g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w))
         • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2)
            • lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2))
        • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2))
       • ((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2))
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
      • ((g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w)
         • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2)
            • (rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
               • ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
                  • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
                     • ((FA v
                         ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
                        • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w)
                             (g1 · g2)
                           • lassociator (FA v · FA w)
                               g1 g2))))))))) =
rassociator g1 (FA' v · g2) (FA'' w)
• ((g1 ◃ rassociator (FA' v) g2 (FA'' w))
   • (lassociator g1 (FA' v) (g2 · FA'' w)
      • ((g1 · FA' v ◃ δ2 w)
         • ((δ1 v ▹ FA' w · g2)
            • (lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
               • ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
                  • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
                     • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1
                        ▹ g2))))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
• ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
   • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
      • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
         • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
            • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2)))) =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

    (* two occurrences of [δ1] and [δ2] vanished
       ten two-cells remain, one occurrence of [δ1] on both sides *)
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
• (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2) =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux2: rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
• (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2) =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2)
rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
• ((FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2)
   • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
      • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
         • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
            • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2)))) =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2

  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
• (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2) =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2)

   • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2

?b =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• (id₂ g2 ⋆⋆ rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
   • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2)

• (id₂ g2 ⋆⋆ rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w)
   • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2)
 apply inverse_pentagon_4. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2

• lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2 ⋆⋆ id₂ (FA v)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux2: rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
• (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2) =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2)
((((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
    • (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 = ?b

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux2: rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
• (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2) =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2)
rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
• (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2) = ?y'

      exact Haux2. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
Haux2: rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w · g2)
• (FA v ◃ lassociator g1 (FA' w) g2) =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2)
((((lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
    • ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
((((lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
    • ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
       • rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2))
   • (FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2)))
  • (FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2))
 • lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2))
• lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2 =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • (rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2
      • ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
         • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
            • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
               • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2))))) =
lassociator (FA v · g1) (FA' w) g2
• ((rassociator (FA v) g1 (FA' w) ▹ g2)
   • (((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)))

  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat g2
v, w: V
rassociator (FA v) (g1 · FA' w) g2
• ((FA v ◃ (δ1 w ▹ g2))
   • ((FA v ◃ rassociator (FA w) g1 g2)
      • (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) (g1 · g2)
         • lassociator (FA v · FA w) g1 g2))) =
((FA v ◃ δ1 w) ▹ g2)
• (lassociator (FA v) (FA w) g1 ▹ g2)

  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
disp_cat_id_comp B disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
disp_cat_id_comp B disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
∏ (x : B) (xx : disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
∏ (x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(g : B ⟦ y, z ⟧) (xx : disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor x)
(yy : disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor y)
(zz : disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
∏ (x : B) (xx : disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
(FA,, FAm) -->[ id₁ a] (FA,, FAm)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat (id₁ a)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
(λ δ : parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat (id₁ a),
 param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V 
   (pr2 (FA,, FAm)) (pr2 (FA,, FAm)) 
   (id₁ a) δ
 × param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V
     (pr2 (FA,, FAm)) (pr2 (FA,, FAm)) 
     (id₁ a) δ) ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat (id₁ a)
 exact (disp_actionbicat_disp_id_nat_trans FAm).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a: B
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
(λ δ : parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat (id₁ a),
 param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V (pr2 (FA,, FAm))
   (pr2 (FA,, FAm)) (id₁ a) δ
 × param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V
     (pr2 (FA,, FAm)) (pr2 (FA,, FAm)) (id₁ a) δ)
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_id_nat_trans FAm)
 split; [apply disp_actionbicat_disp_id_triangle | apply disp_actionbicat_disp_id_pentagon]; assumption.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
∏ (x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor x)
(yy : disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor y)
(zz : disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0

  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: (FA,, FAm) -->[ g1] (FA',, FA'm)
Hyp2: (FA',, FA'm) -->[ g2] (FA'',, FA''m)
(FA,, FAm) -->[ g1 · g2] (FA'',, FA''m)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B

  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
(FA,, FAm) -->[ g1 · g2] (FA'',, FA''m)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA''m
  (g1 · g2)
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans Hyp1 Hyp2)
× param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA''m
    (g1 · g2)
    (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans Hyp1 Hyp2)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a0, a1, a2: B
g1: B ⟦ a0, a1 ⟧
g2: B ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a0
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a0)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a1
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a1)
  FA'
FA'': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a2
FA''m: fmonoidal Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a2) FA''
Hyp1: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FAm FA'm g1
Hyp2: disp_actionbicat_disp_mor FA'm FA''m g2
param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA''m
  (g1 · g2)
  (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans Hyp1 Hyp2)
× param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA''m
    (g1 · g2)
    (disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans Hyp1 Hyp2)
 split; [apply disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_triangle | apply disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_pentagon]; assumption.
  Defined.

  Definition disp_actionbicat_disp_catdata : disp_cat_data B
    := (disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor,,disp_actionbicat_disp_id_comp).

  Definition bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body
    {a a' : B}
    {f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, a' ⟧}
    (η : f1 ==> f2)
    (FA : V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a)
    (FA' : V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a')
    (δ1 : parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1)
    (δ2 : parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2)
    (v : V): UU
    := δ1 v • (FA v ◃ η) = (η ▹ FA' v) • δ2 v.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
η: f1 ==> f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
v: V
isaprop
  (bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body η FA FA' δ1
     δ2 v)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
η: f1 ==> f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
v: V
isaprop
  (bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body η FA FA' δ1
     δ2 v)

    apply B.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
disp_2cell_struct disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
disp_2cell_struct disp_actionbicat_disp_ob_mor

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
η: f1 ==> f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
UU

    exact (∏ v: V, bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body η FA FA' δ1 δ2 v).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
η: f1 ==> f2
M: disp_actionbicat_disp_catdata a
M': disp_actionbicat_disp_catdata a'
FM1: M -->[ f1] M'
FM2: M -->[ f2] M'
isaprop
  (bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct a a' f1 f2 η M
     M' FM1 FM2)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
η: f1 ==> f2
M: disp_actionbicat_disp_catdata a
M': disp_actionbicat_disp_catdata a'
FM1: M -->[ f1] M'
FM2: M -->[ f2] M'
isaprop
  (bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct a a' f1 f2 η M
     M' FM1 FM2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
η: f1 ==> f2
M: disp_actionbicat_disp_catdata a
M': disp_actionbicat_disp_catdata a'
FM1: M -->[ f1] M'
FM2: M -->[ f2] M'
∏ t : V,
isofhlevel 1
  (bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body η (pr1 M)
     (pr1 M') (pr1 FM1) (pr1 FM2) t)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
η: f1 ==> f2
M: disp_actionbicat_disp_catdata a
M': disp_actionbicat_disp_catdata a'
FM1: M -->[ f1] M'
FM2: M -->[ f2] M'
v: V
isofhlevel 1
  (bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body η (pr1 M)
     (pr1 M') (pr1 FM1) (pr1 FM2) v)

    apply isaprop_bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body.
  Qed.

  Definition bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
    :  disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells B
    := (disp_actionbicat_disp_catdata,, bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct).

  Ltac aux_bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_ops :=
      intros; red; cbn;
      unfold bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct, bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body;
      intro v;
      unfold disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans, disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans_data;
      cbn; show_id_type.

  Definition actionbicat_ax2 : UU :=
  (∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
  (w : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
  (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
  (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
  (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
  (gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
  disp_2cells (rassociator f g h) (ff ;; gg ;; hh) (ff ;; (gg ;; hh)))
 × (∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
    (w : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
    (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
    (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
    (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
    (gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
    disp_2cells (lassociator f g h) (ff ;; (gg ;; hh)) (ff ;; gg ;; hh))
   × (∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g) (s : g ==> h)
      (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
      (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
      (gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y),
      disp_2cells r ff gg → disp_2cells s gg hh → disp_2cells (r • s) ff hh)
     × (∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : g1 ==> g2)
        (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
        (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
        (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
        (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z) (gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
        disp_2cells r gg1 gg2 → disp_2cells (f ◃ r) (ff ;; gg1) (ff ;; gg2))
       × (∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : f1 ==> f2)
          (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
          (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
          (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c) (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y)
          (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y) (gg : y -->[ g] z),
         disp_2cells r ff1 ff2 → disp_2cells (r ▹ g) (ff1 ;; gg) (ff2 ;; gg)).

  Context (ax2 : actionbicat_ax2).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
disp_prebicat_ops
  bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
disp_prebicat_ops
  bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       a)
(y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (id₂ f) f' f'

ax2: actionbicat_ax2

       a)
(y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (lunitor f) (id_disp x ;; f') f'

ax2: actionbicat_ax2

       a)

       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (runitor f) (f' ;; id_disp y) f'

       a)

       a)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
(∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
 (w : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
        a)
 (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
        b)
 (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
        c)
 (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
        d) (ff : w -->[ f] x) 
 (gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
 disp_2cells (rassociator f g h) 
   (ff ;; gg ;; hh) (ff ;; (gg ;; hh)))
× (∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
   (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
   (w : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
          a)
   (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
          b)
   (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
          c)
   (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
          d) (ff : w -->[ f] x) 
   (gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
   disp_2cells (lassociator f g h) 
     (ff ;; (gg ;; hh)) 
     (ff ;; gg ;; hh))
  × (∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
     (r : f ==> g) (s : g ==> h)
     (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
            a)
     (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
            b) (ff : x -->[ f] y) 
     (gg : x -->[ g] y) 
     (hh : x -->[ h] y),
     disp_2cells r ff gg
     → disp_2cells s gg hh → disp_2cells (r • s) ff hh)
    × (∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧) 
       (r : g1 ==> g2)
       (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
              a)
       (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
              b)
       (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
              c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
       (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z) 
       (gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
       disp_2cells r gg1 gg2
       → disp_2cells (f ◃ r) (ff ;; gg1) (ff ;; gg2))
      × (∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧) 
         (r : f1 ==> f2)
         (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
                a)
         (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
                b)
         (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
                c) (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y)
         (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y) 
         (gg : y -->[ g] z),
         disp_2cells r ff1 ff2
         → disp_2cells (r ▹ g) (ff1 ;; gg) (ff2 ;; gg))

    (*repeat split; intros; red ; cbn;
      unfold bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct, bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body;
      intro v;
      unfold disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans, disp_actionbicat_disp_comp_nat_trans_data;
      cbn; show_id_type. *)
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       a)
(y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (id₂ f) f' f'
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ id₂ f) =
(id₂ f ▹ pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
pr1 f' v • id₂ (pr1 x v · f) =
(id₂ f ▹ pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
pr1 f' v = (id₂ f ▹ pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
pr1 f' v = id₂ (f · pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v
 apply pathsinv0, id2_left.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       a)
(y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (lunitor f) (id_disp x ;; f') f'
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= id₁ a · f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
(rassociator (id₁ a) f (pr1 y v)
 • ((id₁ a ◃ pr1 f' v)
    • ((lassociator (id₁ a) (pr1 x v) f
        • ((lunitor (pr1 x v) • rinvunitor (pr1 x v))
           ▹ f)) • rassociator (pr1 x v) (id₁ a) f)))
• (pr1 x v ◃ lunitor f) =
(lunitor f ▹ pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= id₁ a · f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
(rassociator (id₁ a) f (pr1 y v)
 • ((id₁ a ◃ pr1 f' v)
    • ((lassociator (id₁ a) (pr1 x v) f
        • ((lunitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f)
           • (rinvunitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f)))
       • rassociator (pr1 x v) (id₁ a) f)))
• (pr1 x v ◃ lunitor f) =
(lunitor f ▹ pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= id₁ a · f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
(rassociator (id₁ a) f (pr1 y v)
 • ((id₁ a ◃ pr1 f' v)
    • ((lassociator (id₁ a) (pr1 x v) f
        • ((lunitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f)
           • (rinvunitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f)))
       • rassociator (pr1 x v) (id₁ a) f)))
• (pr1 x v ◃ lunitor f) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= id₁ a · f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
?b = (lunitor f ▹ pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= id₁ a · f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
(rassociator (id₁ a) f (pr1 y v)
 • ((id₁ a ◃ pr1 f' v)
    • ((lassociator (id₁ a) (pr1 x v) f
        • ((lunitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f)
           • (rinvunitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f)))
       • rassociator (pr1 x v) (id₁ a) f)))
• (pr1 x v ◃ lunitor f) = ?b

v: V
TYPE:= id₁ a · f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
rassociator (id₁ a) f (pr1 y v)
• ((id₁ a ◃ pr1 f' v)
   • (lassociator (id₁ a) (pr1 x v) f
      • ((lunitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f)
         • ((rinvunitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f)
            • (rassociator (pr1 x v) (id₁ a) f
               • (pr1 x v ◃ lunitor f)))))) = ?b

rassociator (pr1 x v) (id₁ a) f
• (pr1 x v ◃ lunitor f) = ?t2

        apply lunitor_lwhisker. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= id₁ a · f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
rassociator (id₁ a) f (pr1 y v)
• ((id₁ a ◃ pr1 f' v)
   • (lassociator (id₁ a) (pr1 x v) f
      • ((lunitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f)
         • ((rinvunitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f)
            • (runitor (pr1 x v) ▹ f))))) =
(lunitor f ▹ pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v

B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= id₁ a · f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
lunitor (f · pr1 y v) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (id₁ a) f (pr1 y v))
^-1 • (lunitor f ▹ pr1 y v)

lunitor (f · pr1 y v) =

• (lunitor f ▹ pr1 y v)

      apply pathsinv0, lunitor_triangle.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       a)
(y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (runitor f) (f' ;; id_disp y) f'
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · id₁ b · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
(rassociator f (id₁ b) (pr1 y v)
 • ((f ◃ (lunitor (pr1 y v) • rinvunitor (pr1 y v)))
    • ((lassociator f (pr1 y v) (id₁ b)
        • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
       • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b))))
• (pr1 x v ◃ runitor f) =
(runitor f ▹ pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v

B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · id₁ b · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
id₂ (f · pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v = ?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · id₁ b · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
rassociator f (id₁ b) (pr1 y v)
• ((f ◃ lunitor (pr1 y v)) • pr1 f' v) =
(runitor f ▹ pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2

f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · id₁ b · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
(rassociator f (id₁ b) (pr1 y v)
 • (f ◃ lunitor (pr1 y v))) • pr1 f' v =
(runitor f ▹ pr1 y v) • pr1 f' v

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · id₁ b · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · f: UU
rassociator f (id₁ b) (pr1 y v)
• (f ◃ lunitor (pr1 y v)) = runitor f ▹ pr1 y v

      apply lunitor_lwhisker.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       a)
(y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (linvunitor f) f' (id_disp x ;; f')
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (id₁ a · f): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ linvunitor f) =
(linvunitor f ▹ pr1 y v)
• (rassociator (id₁ a) f (pr1 y v)
   • ((id₁ a ◃ pr1 f' v)
      • ((lassociator (id₁ a) (pr1 x v) f
          • ((lunitor (pr1 x v) • rinvunitor (pr1 x v))
             ▹ f)) • rassociator (pr1 x v) (id₁ a) f)))

f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (id₁ a · f): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ linvunitor f) = ?b

v: V

linvunitor f ⋆⋆ id₂ (pr1 x v) =
id₂ f ⋆⋆ rinvunitor (pr1 x v)
• rassociator (pr1 x v) (id₁ a) f

      apply triangle_r_inv.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       a)
(y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (rinvunitor f) f' (f' ;; id_disp y)

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) =
(rinvunitor f ▹ pr1 y v)
• (rassociator f (id₁ b) (pr1 y v)
   • ((f ◃ (lunitor (pr1 y v) • rinvunitor (pr1 y v)))
      • ((lassociator f (pr1 y v) (id₁ b)
          • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
         • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b))))

f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) =
(rinvunitor f ▹ pr1 y v)
• (rassociator f (id₁ b) (pr1 y v)
   • (((f ◃ lunitor (pr1 y v))
       • (f ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 y v)))
      • ((lassociator f (pr1 y v) (id₁ b)
          • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
         • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b))))

v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) = ?b

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
?b =
(rinvunitor f ▹ pr1 y v)
• (rassociator f (id₁ b) (pr1 y v)
   • (((f ◃ lunitor (pr1 y v))
       • (f ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 y v)))
      • ((lassociator f (pr1 y v) (id₁ b)
          • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
         • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b))))

?b =

• (rassociator f (id₁ b) (pr1 y v)
   • (((f ◃ lunitor (pr1 y v))

         • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b))))

Mon_V: monoidal V

ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V

• (f ◃ lunitor (pr1 y v))

        apply (! lunitor_lwhisker _ _).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) =
(rinvunitor f ▹ pr1 y v)
• (((runitor f ▹ pr1 y v) • (f ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 y v)))
   • ((lassociator f (pr1 y v) (id₁ b)
       • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
      • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b)))

      (* Search (lassociator _ _ (id₁ _)). *)
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) = ?b

y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b

v: V

• lassociator f (pr1 y v) (id₁ b)

        apply (! rinvunitor_triangle  _ _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) =
(rinvunitor f ▹ pr1 y v)
• ((runitor f ▹ pr1 y v)
   • ((rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
      • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) =
((rinvunitor f ▹ pr1 y v) • (runitor f ▹ pr1 y v))
• ((rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
   • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) =
((rinvunitor f • runitor f) ▹ pr1 y v)
• ((rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
   • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) =
(id₂ f ▹ pr1 y v)
• ((rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
   • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) =
id₂ (f · pr1 y v)
• ((rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
   • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • (pr1 x v ◃ rinvunitor f) =
(rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
• rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v
• (rinvunitor (pr1 x v · f)
   • rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b)) =
(rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
• rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
(pr1 f' v • rinvunitor (pr1 x v · f))
• rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b) =
(rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b))
• rassociator (pr1 x v) f (id₁ b)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
pr1 f' v • rinvunitor (pr1 x v · f) =
rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • id₂ (id₁ b) ⋆⋆ pr1 f' v =
rinvunitor (f · pr1 y v) • (pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a
y: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b
f': x -->[ f] y
v: V
TYPE:= f · pr1 y v ==> pr1 x v · (f · id₁ b): UU
id₂ (id₁ b) ⋆⋆ pr1 f' v = pr1 f' v ▹ id₁ b

      apply hcomp_identity_right.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
(∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
 (w : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
        a)
 (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
        b)
 (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
        c)
 (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
        d) (ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
 (hh : y -->[ h] z),
 disp_2cells (rassociator f g h) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
   (ff ;; (gg ;; hh)))
× (∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
   (w : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
          a)
   (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
          b)
   (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
          c)
   (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
          d) (ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
   (hh : y -->[ h] z),
   disp_2cells (lassociator f g h) (ff ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (ff ;; gg ;; hh))
  × (∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
     (s : g ==> h)
     (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
            a)
     (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
            b) (ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
     (hh : x -->[ h] y),
     disp_2cells r ff gg
     → disp_2cells s gg hh → disp_2cells (r • s) ff hh)
    × (∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : g1 ==> g2)
       (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
              a)
       (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
              b)
       (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
              c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
       (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z) (gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
       disp_2cells r gg1 gg2
       → disp_2cells (f ◃ r) (ff ;; gg1) (ff ;; gg2))
      × (∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : f1 ==> f2)
         (x : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
                a)
         (y : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
                b)
         (z : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
                c) (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y)
         (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y) (gg : y -->[ g] z),
         disp_2cells r ff1 ff2
         → disp_2cells (r ▹ g) (ff1 ;; gg) (ff2 ;; gg))
 exact ax2.

  (* probably not useful for 10th goal after splitting:
      induction x as [FA FAm].
      induction y as [FA' FA'm].
      induction f' as [δ [tria penta]].
      cbn.
      red in tria, penta. unfold param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body in penta.
      (* assert (δnat := pr2 δ). red in δnat.
      unfold H, H' in δnat. cbn in δnat.
      rewrite hcomp_identity_left in δnat; rewrite hcomp_identity_right in δnat. *)
       *)

  Qed.

  Definition bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_data : disp_prebicat_data B
    := (bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells,, bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_ops).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
disp_prebicat_laws
  bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_data

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
disp_prebicat_laws
  bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_data

    repeat split; intro; intros; apply isaprop_bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct.
  Qed.

  Definition bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat : disp_prebicat B
    := (bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_data,,bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat_laws).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
disp_bicat B

ax2: actionbicat_ax2

ax2: actionbicat_ax2

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
η: f1 ==> f2
M: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat a
M': bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat a'
FM1: M -->[ f1] M'
FM2: M -->[ f2] M'
isaset (disp_2cells η FM1 FM2)

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2

M': bidisp_actionbicat_disp_prebicat a'
FM1: M -->[ f1] M'
FM2: M -->[ f2] M'
isaprop (disp_2cells η FM1 FM2)

    apply isaprop_bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct.
  Defined.

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
∏ (a b : B) (f g : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
(aa : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_bicat a)
(bb : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_bicat b)
(ff : aa -->[ f] bb) (gg : aa -->[ g] bb),
isaprop (disp_2cells x ff gg)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_bicat a
bb: bidisp_actionbicat_disp_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (disp_2cells x ff gg)

    apply isaprop_bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct.
  Qed.

  Definition bicatactionbicat : bicat := total_bicat bidisp_actionbicat_disp_bicat.

V: category

ax2: actionbicat_ax2

(aa : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_bicat a)
(bb : bidisp_actionbicat_disp_bicat b)
(ff : aa -->[ f] bb) (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
(xx : disp_2cells x ff gg),
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
is_disp_invertible_2cell ηinvertible is2cell

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
disp_2cells ηinvertible ^-1 (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
(λ y : disp_2cells ηinvertible ^-1
         (δ2,, tria2,, penta2) 
         (δ1,, tria1,, penta1),
 disp_vcomp2 is2cell y =
 transportb
   (λ α : f1 ==> f1,
    disp_2cells α (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
      (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)) 
   (vcomp_rinv ηinvertible)
   (disp_id2 (δ1,, tria1,, penta1))
 × disp_vcomp2 y is2cell =
   transportb
     (λ α : f2 ==> f2,
      disp_2cells α (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
        (δ2,, tria2,, penta2))
     (vcomp_linv ηinvertible)
     (disp_id2 (δ2,, tria2,, penta2))) 
  ?pr1

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'

  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm

  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
pr2 bidisp_actionbicat_disp_bicat a a' f2 f1
  ηinvertible ^-1 (FA,, FAm) (FA',, FA'm)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2) (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B

ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2

  FA

  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1

  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct a a' f2 f1
  ηinvertible ^-1 (FA,, FAm) (FA',, FA'm)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2) (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
δ2 v • (FA v ◃ ηinvertible ^-1) =
(ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v) • δ1 v

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2

  FA'

invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B

  FA

  FA'

  f1 δ1

  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= ?Goal: invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
δ2 v • (FA v ◃ ηinvertible ^-1) =
(ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v) • δ1 v

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
FA v · f2 ==> FA v · f1
 exact (FA v ◃ ηinvertible ^-1).

Mon_V: monoidal V

a, a': B

  f1 δ1

 is_iso. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
     (FA v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
δ2 v • (FA v ◃ ηinvertible ^-1) =
(ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v) • δ1 v

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
     (FA v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
invertible_2cell (f2 · FA' v) (f1 · FA' v)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
     (FA v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
invertible2:= ?Goal: invertible_2cell (f2 · FA' v)
  (f1 · FA' v)
δ2 v • (FA v ◃ ηinvertible ^-1) =
(ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v) • δ1 v

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B

  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'

  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1

  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm

  f2 δ2

  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
     (FA v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
invertible_2cell (f2 · FA' v) (f1 · FA' v)

ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B

  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1

  f1 δ1

f2 · FA' v ==> f1 · FA' v

Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B

is_invertible_2cell ?η

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
     (FA v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
f2 · FA' v ==> f1 · FA' v
 exact (ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v).
        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
     (FA v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
is_invertible_2cell (ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v)
 is_iso. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
     (FA v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
invertible2:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker 
     (FA' v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (f2 · FA' v)
  (f1 · FA' v)
δ2 v • (FA v ◃ ηinvertible ^-1) =
(ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v) • δ1 v

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
     (FA v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
invertible2:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker 
     (FA' v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (f2 · FA' v)
  (f1 · FA' v)
δ2 v =
((ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v) • δ1 v) • invertible1 ^-1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
     (FA v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
invertible2:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker 
     (FA' v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (f2 · FA' v)
  (f1 · FA' v)
δ2 v =
(ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v) • (δ1 v • invertible1 ^-1)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
v: V
invertible1:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
     (FA v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (FA v · f2) (FA v · f1)
invertible2:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker 
     (FA' v)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible)): invertible_2cell (f2 · FA' v)
  (f1 · FA' v)
δ1 v • invertible1 ^-1 = invertible2 ^-1 • δ2 v

      exact (is2cell v).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
B: bicat
ax2: actionbicat_ax2
a, a': B
f1, f2: B ⟦ a, a' ⟧
ηinvertible: invertible_2cell f1 f2
FA: V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a)
  FA
FA': V ⟶ category_from_bicat_and_ob a'
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob a')
  FA'
δ1: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f1
tria1: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
penta1: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f1 δ1
δ2: parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat f2
tria2: param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
penta2: param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq Mon_V FAm FA'm
  f2 δ2
is2cell: disp_2cells ηinvertible
  (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
  (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
(λ y : disp_2cells ηinvertible ^-1
         (δ2,, tria2,, penta2) (δ1,, tria1,, penta1),
 disp_vcomp2 is2cell y =
 transportb
   (λ α : f1 ==> f1,
    disp_2cells α (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)
      (δ1,, tria1,, penta1)) (vcomp_rinv ηinvertible)
   (disp_id2 (δ1,, tria1,, penta1))
 × disp_vcomp2 y is2cell =
   transportb
     (λ α : f2 ==> f2,
      disp_2cells α (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
        (δ2,, tria2,, penta2))
     (vcomp_linv ηinvertible)
     (disp_id2 (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)))
  ((((λ v : V,
      (let invertible1 :=
         make_invertible_2cell
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (FA v)
              (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible))
         in
       let invertible2 :=
         make_invertible_2cell
           (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (FA' v)
              (is_invertible_2cell_inv ηinvertible))
         in
       lhs_right_invert_cell (δ2 v) invertible1
         ((ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v) • δ1 v)
         invertible1
         (internal_paths_rew_r (H f2 v ==> FA v · f2)
            (((ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v) • δ1 v)
             • invertible1 ^-1)
            ((ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v)
             • (δ1 v • invertible1 ^-1))
            (λ p : H f2 v ==> FA v · f2, δ2 v = p)
            (! lhs_left_invert_cell invertible2
                 (δ1 v • invertible1 ^-1) (δ2 v)
                 invertible2 (is2cell v))
            (vassocl (ηinvertible ^-1 ▹ FA' v) (δ1 v)
               invertible1 ^-1)))
      :
      bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body
        ηinvertible ^-1 FA FA' δ2 δ1 v)
     :
     bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct a a' f2 f1
       ηinvertible ^-1 (FA,, FAm) (FA',, FA'm)
       (δ2,, tria2,, penta2) (δ1,, tria1,, penta1))
    :
    pr2 bidisp_actionbicat_disp_bicat a a' f2 f1
      ηinvertible ^-1 (FA,, FAm) (FA',, FA'm)
      (δ2,, tria2,, penta2) (δ1,, tria1,, penta1))
   :
   disp_2cells ηinvertible ^-1 (δ2,, tria2,, penta2)
     (δ1,, tria1,, penta1))
 split; apply isaprop_bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_struct.
  Qed.

End FixMoncatAndBicat.
